36:1:1.m: Special letters that begin this chapter (their full meaning is known only to Allah)

ٓ: marks these as special opening letters

36:2:2.m: The All-Wise (describing القرءان, connected to وَٱلْقُرْءَانِ)

36:4:1.m: upon, on top of (pointing to صِرٰطٍ - path)

36:5:1.m: the sending down (possessed by العَزِيزِ الرَّحِيمِ - the Mighty, the Merciful)

36:6:2.m: a people (object of لِتُنذِرَ - for you to warn)

36:6:7.m: those who are unaware/ignoring (plural, in subject position)

36:7:4.m: upon/over (referring to أَكْثَرِهِمْ - most of them)

36:8:6.m: and so it [the chain] (connects to مُّقْمَحُونَ)

36:8:10.m: those who are forcibly made to lift their heads (referring to the disbelievers mentioned in أَعْنٰقِهِمْ)

قْمَحُ: forcibly made to lift their heads

36:9:5.m: a strong barrier (object of جَعَلْنَا - we made/placed)

36:9:7.m: behind them (after سَدًّا/barrier in this ayah)

36:9:12.m: they see (subject of لَا - 'they do not see')

36:10:1.m: and it is equal (subject of عَلَيْهِمْ)

36:11:7.m: The Most Merciful (being feared in خَشِىَ ٱلرَّحْمٰنَ)

36:11:9.m: then he gave him good news

36:11:10.m: with forgiveness (connected to فَبَشِّرْهُ - then give glad tidings)

36:12:2.m: we (subject of نُحْىِ - we give life)

36:12:6.m: what (that which they have sent ahead)

36:12:13.m: a clear leader (in فِى a clear record)

36:13:1.m: and strike!/give! (an example) (connected to لَهُم - to them)

36:13:2.m: for them/to them (object of وَٱضْرِبْ - and strike)

36:13:3.m: a clear example (object of وَٱضْرِبْ - strike/coin)

36:13:8.m: the messengers (who came to أَصْحٰبَ ٱلْقَرْيَةِ)

36:14:5.m: so they strongly denied/rejected both of them

36:15:2.m: not (negates 'you are only humans like us')

36:15:8.m: he sent down (subject of أَنتُمْ تَكْذِبُونَ - you are lying)

36:15:13.m: you all (when speaking to a group)

36:17:5.m: the clear message (referring to ٱلْبَلٰغُ in this ayah)

36:18:3.m: we saw bad omens (in relation to بِكُمْ - from you)

36:18:8.m: we will definitely stone you all (threat in response to تَطَيَّرْنَا)

36:18:9.m: and surely he will definitely touch you all

36:19:6.m: rather/but rather (contrasts with what was said before)

36:20:1.m: and he came (followed by مِنْ أَقْصَا ٱلْمَدِينَةِ - from the far end of the city)

36:20:7.m: he said (introducing what the running man يَسْعَىٰ said to his people)

36:20:10.m: the messengers (who were sent with divine messages)

36:21:3.m: no/not (emphasizing the negation of يَسْـَٔلُكُمْ/asks you)

36:21:5.m: a reward (object of يَسْـَٔلُكُمْ - asks you for)

36:21:7.m: those who are guided (subject of هُم)

36:22:2.m: for me (object of أَعْبُدُ - I worship)

36:22:8.m: you (all) are being returned (to إِلَيْهِ - to Him)

36:23:8.m: with any harm (object of يُرِدْنِ - intends for me)

36:24:3.m: surely in (connects ضَلٰلٍ to the sentence)

36:24:4.m: in a state of being lost (after فِي)

ضَلٰل: in a state of being lost

36:25:3.m: by/in your master who cares for you (subject of ءَامَنتُ)

36:25:4.m: so listen to me! (to many people)

36:26:2.m: Enter! (command to one person) (connects to الْجَنَّةَ - Paradise)

36:27:7.m: the honored ones (referring to specific people mentioned in مِنَ)

36:28:6.m: after him (referring to قَوْمِهِۦ - his people)

36:28:13.m: those who send down (object of كُنَّا)

36:30:3.m: the servants (who are being addressed in يٰحَسْرَةً عَلَى)

36:30:7.m: any messenger (being referred to in مِن رَّسُولٍ - 'of any messenger')

36:31:2.m: they see (in أَلَمْ يَرَوْا۟ - 'Did they not see?')

36:31:6.m: from (connecting ٱلْقُرُونِ to what came before)

36:31:11.m: they return (subject of لَا in this ayah)

36:33:1.m: and a sign (subject of what follows)

36:33:3.m: the earth (subject of أَحْيَيْنٰهَا - we revived it)

ُ: subject of أَحْيَيْنٰهَا - we revived it

36:33:5.m: we gave life to it (referring to الْأَرْضُ - the earth)

هَا: to it (referring to الْأَرْضُ - the earth)

36:33:8.m: grain/seed (object of أَخْرَجْنَا - we brought forth)

36:33:10.m: they eat (from the grain mentioned in أَحْيَيْنٰهَا وَأَخْرَجْنَا مِنْهَا حَبًّا)

36:34:3.m: gardens (being described by مِّن نَّخِيلٍ وَأَعْنٰبٍ - of palms and grapes)

تٍ: (being described by مِّن نَّخِيلٍ وَأَعْنٰبٍ - of palms and grapes)

36:34:7.m: and we caused (something) to burst forth abundantly

36:34:8.m: in them/in it (referring to جَنَّاتٍ - gardens)

36:35:7.m: so will they not? (expecting them to يَشْكُرُونَ - be grateful)

36:35:8.m: they show gratitude (referring to those who benefit from Allah's provisions mentioned in the previous ayah)

36:36:2.m: the one who, which, that (describes سُبْحٰنَ)

36:36:4.m: the pairs, the types (object of خَلَقَ - created)

36:37:4.m: we strip/peel off (the daylight from the night)

36:37:6.m: the daytime (object being stripped away in نَسْلَخُ مِنْهُ)

َ: (object being stripped away in نَسْلَخُ مِنْهُ)

36:37:9.m: ones who are in deep darkness

36:39:1.m: and the moon (object of قَدَّرْنٰهُ/We determined)

36:39:6.m: like the date stalk (that appears in the sky)

36:40:4.m: for her/it (referring to الشَّمْسُ - the sun)

36:40:5.m: that (connects to تُدْرِكَ - it catches up)

36:40:7.m: the moon (object of تُدْرِكَ - to reach/overtake)

36:40:10.m: one who races ahead (describing الليل/the night)

36:40:14.m: in an orbit (referring to where celestial bodies move)

36:40:15.m: they glide (through space) (referring to celestial bodies in their orbits)

36:43:5.m: any helper/rescuer (object of فَلَا - 'there is no')

36:44:6.m: a time, a period (object of إِلَىٰ)

36:45:2.m: it was said (to لَهُمُ - to them)

36:45:3.m: to them (masculine plural, connects to ٱتَّقُوا۟)

36:45:10.m: so that you all (might receive mercy)

36:46:7.m: their master who cares for them (belonging to ءَايٰتِ)

36:46:10.m: away from it (referring to the signs/آيات)

36:46:11.m: those who turn away (subject of كَانُوا)

36:47:11.m: for those who (who are being addressed in كَفَرُوا)

36:49:6.m: she/it takes them (referring to صَيْحَةً taking them)

36:51:5.m: they (referring to those rising from graves)

هُم: they (referring to those rising from graves)

36:51:10.m: they are rushing out (from الْأَجْدَاثِ/their graves)

36:52:3.m: who (asking about who woke them up)

36:52:4.m: he raised/resurrected us (from مَّرْقَدِنَا - our sleeping place)

36:52:7.m: this (pointing to what the disbelievers are saying about their resurrection)

هٰذَا: this (pointing to what the disbelievers are saying about their resurrection)

36:52:11.m: and he spoke truth (about the resurrection)

36:53:8.m: all together (describing the group in هُمْ/they)

36:54:7.m: you (all) are given what is due

36:54:9.m: that which (connects to تَعْمَلُونَ - you used to do)

36:54:11.m: you all do/work (referring to the actions of those being addressed)

ونَ: (referring to the actions of those being addressed)

36:55:3.m: of the Paradise (referring to the garden in Heaven)

جَنَّةِ: Paradise (referring to the garden in Heaven)

36:55:4.m: on that day (when the people of Paradise will be in joy)

36:55:6.m: in occupations (referring to the people of Paradise being busy with enjoyable activities)

36:55:7.m: ones who are cheerful (in nominative case)

36:56:6.m: on/upon the raised couches (connected to عَلَى)

36:56:7.m: those who are reclining (referring to the people of Paradise)

36:60:2.m: Did I not make a covenant

36:60:3.m: to you all (connected to أَعْهَدْ - I took a covenant)

36:60:5.m: Adam (being addressed in يٰبَنِىٓ ءَادَمَ - O children of Adam)

36:60:9.m: Satan (as the object being warned against)

36:62:4.m: a very large group (being led astray in أَضَلَّ)

36:62:6.m: Then did not...? (connects to تَكُونُوا۟ تَعْقِلُونَ - you use reason)

36:63:2.m: hell (this is the one that was promised to you)

36:63:3.m: the one which/that (feminine, referring to جَهَنَّمُ)

36:64:2.m: the day (object of ٱصْلَوْهَا - enter/burn in it)

36:64:5.m: you all reject/deny (referring to the disbelievers being addressed)

36:65:2.m: we seal (referring to what Allah will do on that Day)

36:65:5.m: and she speaks to us (subject: their hands)

36:65:6.m: their hands (speaking about the disbelievers whose mouths are sealed)

36:65:7.m: and she witnesses/testifies (subject: أَرْجُلُهُم - their feet)

36:65:11.m: they earn/gain (referring to what they used to do)

36:66:8.m: so how (could they see in يُبْصِرُونَ)

36:68:3.m: we turn him completely upside down

36:68:7.m: they use their minds (أَفَلَا - so do they not)

36:69:3.m: the poetry (object that was not taught)

36:69:10.m: a reminder (connected to قُرْءَانٌ مُّبِينٌ - clear Quran)

36:69:11.m: and a clear recitation (referring to the Quran)

قُرْءَانٌ: a clear recitation (referring to the Quran)

36:69:12.m: a very clear explanation (of the Quran)

36:70:1.m: so that he may warn (those who are alive)

36:70:5.m: and it becomes true/proven (connected to لِّيُنذِرَ - to warn)

36:70:8.m: the disbelievers (object of يَحِقَّ ٱلْقَوْلُ عَلَى)

36:71:2.m: they see (أَنَّا خَلَقْنَا - that We created)

36:71:3.m: that we (subject of خَلَقْنَا - we created)

36:72:1.m: and we made it (the animals) easy to control

36:74:5.m: gods (as the object of وَٱتَّخَذُوا۟ - they took)

ً: (as the object of وَٱتَّخَذُوا۟ - they took)

36:75:7.m: those who are brought (plural passive participle)

36:76:9.m: they make public (what they say, in contrast to يُسِرُّونَ - what they hide)

36:77:1.m: and has he not... ? (questioning the subject يَرَ)

36:77:2.m: he sees (questioning if ٱلْإِنسٰنُ has seen)

36:77:3.m: the human being (as the subject who did not see/reflect - referring to يَرَ)

ُ: as the subject who did not see/reflect - referring to يَرَ

36:77:7.m: from/of a single drop (of sperm/fluid) (after مِن)

36:78:1.m: and he set forth (subject of قَالَ)

36:78:3.m: an example (object of ضَرَبَ - he set forth)

36:78:4.m: and he forgot (subject of قَالَ - he said)

نَسِىَ: he forgot (subject of قَالَ - he said)

36:78:7.m: who (asks about the person who will give life to the bones)

36:78:9.m: the bones (object of يُحْىِ - gives life to)

36:79:1.m: say! (command to يُحْيِيهَا - He gives life to it)

36:79:4.m: he created it/her (referring to the first creation)

36:80:1.m: the one who/which (connects to جَعَلَ - made)

36:80:2.m: he made (subject of the verb that connects to لَكُم - for you)

َ: (subject of the verb that connects to لَكُم - for you)

36:81:3.m: he created (subject of بِقٰدِرٍ - being capable)

36:81:5.m: and the earth (as the object being discussed along with السَّمٰوٰتِ)

36:81:6.m: with ability (in أَوَلَيْسَ - is He not?)

36:81:11.m: yes indeed (contradicting the negative question أَوَلَيْسَ - is not?)

36:81:13.m: The Supreme Creator (subject of the sentence)

36:82:4.m: he wanted/willed (subject of يَقُولَ - he says)

36:82:5.m: a thing (object of أَرَادَ - he willed)

36:82:10.m: and so it becomes (in response to كُن)
